title: balance() counts undecrypted stub notes as spendable
description: balance() sums all unspent notes WHERE spent=0, including rows where note_diversifier/note_pk_d/note_rseed are NULL (not yet IVK-decrypted). spendable_notes() filters those out via IS NOT NULL. Result: wallet can show a positive confirmed balance but return NoSpendableNotes on spend — confusing and misleading to the user. Fix: add same IS NOT NULL guards to the balance query, or document that balance() is a superset of spendable funds.
